channel.title: Homepage on Yuhui Zhu
channel.description: Recent content in Homepage on Yuhui Zhu

item.title: About Me
item.description: My academic projects At our lab, I previously conducted multiple cybersecurity studies and gained extensive engineering experience in Internet measurement, web dataset collection, and malware analysis. In our earlier flow-based mobile malware detection research, I was in charge of building the Android app dataset with large-scale web crawlers and developing an Android testbench to collect apps’ network traces. Later as a graduate student, I started IoT malware research to apply our successful practices to the IoT field.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Group projects IoT Malware Intelligence Collecting System foobarbaz Data Analyze and Storage Infrastructures foobarbaz Android Test Farm foobarbaz Network Traffic Online Analyzer in High-Speed Networks and Embedded Devices foobarbaz A Python Port of Nodogsplash foobarbaz Personal & hobby projects Hacking Network Authenticator Apps to Bypass NAT Detection on Android foobarbaz An MIPS R3000 CPU on FPGA foobarbaz High-performance DNS Mirror Server based on DPDK foobarbaz RGB LED Strip Controller with Bluetooth Remote Control

item.title: Publications
item.description: Mining Function Homology of Bot Loaders from Honeypot Logs. Yuhui Zhu, Zhenxiang Chen, Qiben Yan, Shanshan Wang, Enlong Li, Lizhi Peng, Chuan Zhao In progress, arXiv🌐. IoT Botnet Detection framework from Network Behavior based on Extreme Learning Machine Nasimul Hasan, Zhenxiang Chen, Chuan Zhao, Yuhui Zhu, Cong Liu IEEE INFOCOM WKSHPS: BigSecurity 2022 [CCF-A] AndroCreme: Unseen Android Malware Detection Based on Inductive Conformal Learning Gang Zhang, Hao Li, Zhenxiang Chen, Lizhi Peng, Yuhui Zhu, Chuan Zhao TrustCom 2021 [CCF-C]
